summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sub-fase 1.6 Backorder Lifecycle. Backend auto-fulfill flow works perfectly with 0 data integrity failures. All critical backorder scenarios tested and passing.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/sales-orders with allow_backorder=true and qty > stock → status 'waiting_stock', has_backorder=true, backorders array filled, reserved_qty + backorder_qty == quantity
✅ Backend: POST /api/sales-orders with allow_backorder=false (default) and qty > stock → HTTP 409 (backward compatible)
✅ Backend: Cancel SO waiting_stock → rolls released, status cancelled
✅ Backend: Release-reservation on waiting_stock → status draft, backorders empty
✅ Backend: Orders stats includes backorder count
✅ Backend AUTO-FULFILL FLOW: Created backorder SO (waiting_stock, 755m reserved + 50m backorder)
✅ Backend AUTO-FULFILL FLOW: Created PO for 50m to fulfill backorder
✅ Backend AUTO-FULFILL FLOW: Inbound scan-receive 50m successful
✅ Backend AUTO-FULFILL FLOW: Inbound complete (GR) successful
✅ Backend AUTO-FULFILL FLOW: SO auto-fulfilled - status changed from waiting_stock → reserved
✅ Backend AUTO-FULFILL FLOW: has_backorder changed from true → false
✅ Backend AUTO-FULFILL FLOW: Item backorder_qty changed from 50m → 0m (fulfilled)
✅ Backend AUTO-FULFILL FLOW: Item reserved_qty changed from 755m → 805m (full quantity)
✅ CRITICAL: Data integrity verification - 88 PASS, 0 FAIL
✅ CRITICAL: balance == Σ rolls invariant PASSED (Roll-as-SSOT maintained)
✅ CRITICAL: L4-BO invariants PASSED (quantity == reserved + backorder per item)
✅ CRITICAL: L4-BO invariants PASSED (status waiting_stock <=> Σbackorder>0)
✅ CRITICAL: L4-BO invariants PASSED (backorder owner-scoped, entity == SO.entity_id)
✅ Frontend: CartPanel has backorder checkbox (data-testid='allow-backorder-checkbox')
✅ Frontend: CartPanel has backorder option card (data-testid='backorder-option-card')
✅ Frontend: OrdersView has backorder stat card (data-testid='orders-stat-backorder')
✅ Frontend: OrdersView filter includes 'Waiting Stock (Backorder)' option
✅ Frontend: OrderDetailPanel has backorder panel (data-testid='order-backorder-panel')
✅ Frontend: OrderDetailPanel has release reservation button (data-testid='release-reservation-button-{id}')
✅ Frontend: Order items show backorder breakdown (data-testid='order-item-backorder-{productId}')
